zh.Walsgrave on Sowe, Metropolitan Borough: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lygon II於1577年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Lygon31歲，母親Frances Dennis17歲。他於1623年8月18日與Elizabeth Pratt在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1586年住在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維。他去世於1626年12月20日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維。

nameMeanings.name: Lygon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possiblyalso an Americanized form of German   Leisen  .

variants.name: Lison
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from Lison in Calvados and Jura, France.
Welsh and English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Leyshon  .
Slovak (Lisoň) and Polish (Lisoń): descriptive nickname for a bald man, from a derivative of lisý ‘bald’ (see Lis ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lygon II was born in 1577, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Lygon, was 31 and his mother, Frances Dennis, was 17. He married Elizabeth Pratt on 18 August 1623, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom in 1586. He died on 20 December 1626, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Pratt le 18 août 1623, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1586. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1626, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Walsgrave on Sowe, Metropolitan Borough: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 월스그레이브  소베
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lygon II(이)가 1577년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Lygon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Dennis(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1623년 8월 18일 영국 워윅실르에서 Elizabeth Pratt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1586년도에 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 월스그레이브  소베에서 살았다. 그는 1626년 12월 20일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 월스그레이브  소베에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pratt em 18 de agosto de 1623, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1586. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lygon II родился в 1577 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Lygon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Frances Dennis, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pratt 18 августа 1623 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности валсграв он соу, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания в 1586 году. Он умер 20 декабря 1626 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности валсграв он соу, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
